$comment: COMMITTED GENERIC DEFAULT runner level (KEEP — names NO game). W2 OVERWRITES this with the materialized blueprint.layout + capability bindings per-game; the construction path is unchanged. Every value here is a neutral default that yields a playable gravity-flap run: a fixed-x avatar, the procedural-obstacle stream (the scroller), score-on-pass (the scorer), and the one-button flap scheme. No theme/art is encoded — slots are absent so the run renders placeholder rects.
